---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for this local-first course assistant
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is awkward or missing today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like the app to do?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you tried or considered (optional).

## Scope notes

- Does this need optional STT / TTS / browser packs?
- Does it stay local-first (no required cloud egress for course audio/text)?
- Any UI surface (Home / Import / Library / Study / Export / Speech / …)?

## Extra context

Links, screenshots, or examples of similar tools — without personal course data.
